episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4001_1001_01: Hey, Kieran. How goes Pasio Academy?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4001_1001_02: Little by little, I’ve been making new friends.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4001_1001_03:
It’s all thanks to everyone’s help...including
you two!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4001_1001_07: Aw, c’mon. Let me copy your assignment!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/6801_1001_01:
Isn’t there anything you wanna do here on
Pasio, Drayton?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/6801_1001_03:
I’m fine just chilling and having fun with
everyone.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/6801_1001_04:
I guess Drayton is Drayton, no matter where
he goes.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_01: Drayton! When did you arrive on Pasio?!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_02: Yo, ex-Champ! Fancy running into you here!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_03: I told you to stop calling me that...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_04:
Bullying a friend even after they ask you to
stop? That’s just not right!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_08:
Drayton’s a member of Blueberry Academy’s
League Club, just like me and Lacey.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_09: Heh heh! Yeah! I’m tight with these two!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_10: You’re always saying whatever you like...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_11:
You just showed up here on Pasio all of a
sudden, but all you’re doing is slacking off...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_12:
What I do is kinda my choice, though.
Aren’t I free to do what I like?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_13:
If you’re here on Pasio, we WOULD like you
to represent the BB League Elite Four!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_14:
If he’s part of the Elite Four, does that mean
he can battle as well as you and Kieran?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_15: Yes, he’s good at battling. JUST battling.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_16:
He was the strongest of the League Club,
until Kieran became Champion.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_17: Wow! He must be good, then!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_19:
It really is impressive that Juliana became
the BB League Champion with such stiff
competition.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_20:
Oh, right. If Kieran’s the ex-Champion, that
means—
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_23: My bad! That was really insensitive.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_24:
No, it’s OK. It’s true. You don’t have to walk
on eggshells...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_25:
Would you please stop calling him
“ex-Champion” already?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_26:
Don’t you know how Kieran feels about it,
Drayton?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_27:
Heh heh. Why should I. I’m just indulgin’ in
some well-earned payback here.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_28:
You’re so mean. Aren’t you an ex-Champion
too?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_31: ’Sup, buddy? If you’re here on Pasio, then—
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_32: Why, if it isn’t young Drayton!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_33:
Gwuh! Mr. Hassel?! This ain’t something
I wanna deal with...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_34:
Lacey isn’t letting me copy her assignment
either, so I’m gonna split!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_36:
If he’s not gonna study, why is he even at
Pasio Academy?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_37:
I’m pretty sure Drayton just wants to battle
everyone.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_38: I think I understand that now.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_40: I came in and wrecked a place he treasured.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_41: I don’t think he’ll ever forgive me for that.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_42: You two seem to have a history.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4002_1001_43: Would you like to share what happened?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_01:
So, after all that, the League Club no longer
had the fun atmosphere Drayton wanted.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_02:
I see. So there were still hard feelings, even
after Kieran was no longer Champion?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_03:
Um... Actually, I don’t think Drayton was
angry at Kieran.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_05:
He seemed sad when you took a break from
Blueberry Academy.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_06:
I heard him say, “I thought we’d have
patched things up by now, but I guess
things ain’t that simple.”
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_09:
I don’t think Drayton wanted you to leave,
Kieran.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_10:
But you did return to Blueberry Academy and
the League Club.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_11:
Drayton’s probably just messing with you
’cause he’s glad to hang out with you again.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_12:
But I’m sure he still feels a little sour about
losing!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_15:
I wonder what young Drayton’s grandfather
would say in this situation.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_16:
Drayton’s grandpa... He’s a Gym Leader,
right?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_17:
Yup. Drayden, from Unova’s Opelucid City
Gym.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_18:
We know each other, as fellow Dragon-type
users.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_19: Wow. He’s got some impressive family.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_20:
My daddy once said Drayden’s a powerful
man who trains by wrestling Pokémon!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_21: Really? Like, literally? Impressive at that age.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_22:
Indeed. Even though Drayden’s mayor of
Opelucid City, he trains daily, without fail.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_23:
He’s a powerhouse with such mental
strength, they call him the Spartan mayor!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_24:
Anyhow, if the two of you are enrolled in
Pasio Academy, that makes you my students!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_25:
As a teacher, I can’t turn a blind eye to a
rift between friends.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_27:
It may feel awkward to face each other and
talk things out...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_28: But the easy way wouldn’t be right.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_29:
Above all, wouldn’t it be better if everyone
got along?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_31:
I don’t like what my relationship with
Drayton has become, either.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_34:
I know it can be scary, having to face
someone you’ve wronged.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_35:
But if you don’t, you’ll regret it for the rest
of your life!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_37:
He’s a good friend of yours from the same
club, right? You can still patch things up!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_39: Thanks, you two. I’ll... I’ll do it!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_40:
I want to make it right with Drayton—and
be friends again!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_42:
Facing it with optimism... I think that would
be a fine idea!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4003_1001_43: Let’s think of ways to restore their friendship!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_02:
We’ll be holding an academy-wide
tournament to crown the strongest tag team!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_03:
Here are the rules! First, everyone will pair
up by drawing lots.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_04: Then, we’ll have a tag battle tournament!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_05:
We’re randomizing the pairs, since being
with folks you know might give an unfair
advantage!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_06: Thus, we’re evening the playing field!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_08:
What fun would it be if you just cheesed
your way through with a partner you know
like the back of your hand?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_10:
(I knew Drayton would like it. It’s just like
his Elite Trial, after all!)
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_12:
That’s all the pairs! Did everyone find their
partner?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_13: Let’s see... My tag battle partner is...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_15:
Yo, ex-Champ! You’re my partner? I can
take it easy, then.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_16: But it looks like you’re raring to go.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_18:
Y-yeah... I figured I’d wear something
different for this tournament...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_19:
Is that so? Guess I can expect great things
from you, then.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_20:
What?! You’re gonna rig it so I’m paired
with Drayton?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_22: I’ll turn a blind eye. It’s to help you both!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4004_1001_23: (After all that, I HAVE to make this work!)
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4005_1101_01:
Thus, the academy tag team tournament
began!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4005_1101_02:
Despite the real reason for the tournament,
the participants still had fun battling.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_01: It’s almost our turn. Ready, Archaludon?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_02: Good to know I can rely on you, buddy.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_03:
Which Pokémon are you battling with today,
ex-Champ?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_05: Furret, huh. It’s been a while.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_07:
If you want to show Drayton you’ve
changed...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_08:
maybe you could battle with a partner
Pokémon you’ve known a long time?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_09:
That narrows it down to either
Hydrapple or...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_10: Wait, no. It should be this guy.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_12: You battled a lot together back in Kitakami.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_13:
Yeah... But I removed him from my team
when I took on the BB League.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_14:
So if I wanna show I can enjoy battling
again...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_17:
Hehehe! Glad to be battling with you again,
Furret!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_18:
All righty, then... I’m countin’ on ya,
ex-Champ!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_19: Uh-huh! I... I got this! Let’s go, Furret!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_20: Get ’em, Furret! You got this, ex-Champ!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_22: (Although it looks like he’s having fun.)
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_24: Good stuff. Keep up the good work, team!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_25: (I don’t think this’ll fix the rift between us...)
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1101_27:
The tournament continued until it reached
the final match.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4006_1001_28: I look forward to the battle, you two.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_01: Getting this far is an accomplishment.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_02:
(But it looks like they still haven’t mended
their friendship.)
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_03: I’ll admit, you both are talented!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_04:
But we come from families of prestigious
dragon masters!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_05: There’s no way you’ll beat us!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_06:
I figured as much. Looks like this one won’t
be easy.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_07:
I face you not as a teacher but as a dragon
with a trial for you two to overcome!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_08:
If you don’t work together, you’ll never best
our strength!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_09:
I’m a Dragon-type user too, so I can tell
Mr. Hassel’s serious.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_12:
He also has the dragon masters’ blood
running through his veins!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_13:
When we Dragon-type users compete,
something boils within us!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_15:
(Now that Drayton’s serious, this is my
chance to match his energy!)
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_16: Let’s not let this drag on! Begin!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_17: Mr. Hassel sure is strong! I can’t take him.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_21: Let’s win! Together! Against Mr. Hassel!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_23:
Do you say that because you’re afraid
we’ll lose?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_24: No... It’s OK if we lose, in the end.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_25: But Furret’s here...and so are you, Drayton...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_26:
So I wanna enjoy this battle! And I hope
we win!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_33:
These feelings never change... And I’ll put
them all into Terastallizing right here,
right now!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_36:
I hoped to use this against you if you ever
came to Pasio.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_37:
I didn’t expect to use it in a tag team
with you!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_38: Amazing! Glad you’re on my side!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_39: Right, then. Let’s wrap it up, shall we?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_41: Let’s give it our all, Furret!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4007_1001_42:
Now watch this dragon’s blood boil!
Archaludon!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_03: Man, I thought we made some progress...
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_04:
Hm? What’s wrong, ex-Champ?
Eat something weird?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_05:
Oh, yeah! Hey, ex-Champ, think you could
take some notes for me in this afternoon’s
lecture?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_06: I’ll bring you some snacks later in exchange!
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_09:
We came to ask if you wanted to hang out.
You busy?
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_11: Heh heh. Glad he’s having fun.
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_13: (I guess it’s kind of a drag, but...)
episode_event_ch0360_ch0357/4008_1001_14:
(If I wanna beat him, maybe putting in more
effort wouldn’t be so bad.)
